tool.name: Lix plugin API candidate A: persistent document plus full blobs
tool.install: included in the isolated Lix research workspace

task: Implement and test the assigned Text, CSV, JSON, Markdown, or Excalidraw plugin task

config.prompt_template: Implement and test the {format} plugin task at {task_path} in {isolated_workspace} using {candidate_api_path}

overrides.temperature: Codex collaboration agents do not expose temperature; 0 records the requested nominal setting, not a verified provider setting
overrides.tools: Codex functions.exec and collaboration.send_message replaced the pinned Claude Code tool list; apply_patch and shell execution were nested under functions.exec
overrides.mcp_servers: Codex does not expose per-agent MCP stripping; no MCP calls were observed in the scored transcripts
overrides.system_prompt: Codex collaboration agents use the Codex system/developer instructions and cannot run with no system prompt
overrides.mode: Codex workspace-write sandbox policy replaced bypassPermissions
overrides.max_turns: Codex collaboration agents do not expose a hard turn cap; 40 records the requested nominal limit

agents.success_reason: The agent implemented the candidate A text plugin in the assigned workspace and `cargo test` passed all 6 tests, explicitly covering the seven required behaviors: stable IDs, single-ID edit, duplicate deletion, retry-stable insertion, reorder preservation, exact entity-change bytes, and discarded-transition immutability.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,320p' src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,220p' README.md; printf '\nSDK\n'; sed -n '1,320p' ../../../api-candidates/src/lib.rs

agents.success_reason: The session implemented the CSV plugin in the assigned workspace using candidate A, added coverage for all eight required behaviors, fixed the only compile error, and finished with `cargo fmt --check && cargo test` passing (1 test passed, 0 failed).
Implemented the candidate A JSON plugin and comprehensive tests covering all eight requirements; cargo test passed 1/1 unit tests and doc tests with no failures.
first_3_commands:
sed -n '1,240p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/json.md && printf '
--- candidate ---
' && sed -n '1,260p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/candidate_a.rs && printf '
--- run files ---
' && find experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print | sort

sed -n '1,240p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/Cargo.toml && printf '
--- lib ---
' && sed -n '1,300p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/src/lib.rs && printf '
--- SDK crate ---
' && sed -n '1,320p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs

agents.success_reason: Implemented an executable Markdown plugin against candidate_a in the assigned workspace; all eight required behaviors have dedicated tests, and an independent cargo test rerun passed 8/8 tests.
Implemented the Excalidraw adapter against candidate A, with five passing tests covering all nine required behaviors; final cargo test completed successfully with 5 passed, 0 failed, and no warnings.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/src/lib.rs && cat experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,300p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs && rg -n "candidate_a|EntitySource|struct Change|enum Change" experiments/plugin-api-v2 -g '*.rs'
